rulings.Case Title: LAKEVIEW CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS. NAU, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, Arpil 6, 2009, line 8, CROSS DEFENDANT LAKEVIEW CONSTRUCTION, INC., TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the first cause of action for violation of the unfair competition law. Merigan to plead more clearly what laws were violated, e.g., what section of the San Francisco Building Code. Merigan also to plead basis for restitution or how it has vested right to the money paid by Nau. Remainder of demurrer overruled. =(302CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES BROUSSARD VS. AIDA SUNGA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, Arpil 6, 2009, line 15, DEFENDANT AIDA SUNGA'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The notice is fatally defective. As a matter of law, plaintiff is required to serve a thirty or sixty day notice to quit, per CC section 1946 and 1946.1 to effectuate on eviction based on habitual late payment. Moreover, the notice defectively provides an opportunity to cure where no opportunity exists.=(302CWW)
